project.name: APEX AI Trading Assistant
project.description: Mobile-first AI-assisted trading platform for Crypto & Forex with advanced SMC/ICT analysis, risk management, and backtesting

features: AI signal board on Signals page
KZ full-height tinted zones with centered header labels
Gold last-price tag on left axis
Volume pane at bottom with colored bars
Black label backgrounds for zone labels
Safe Stop-Loss/Entry/TP tagged pills on right edge
Fixed SignalEngine/SMC adapter KeyError causing signal and backtest HTTP 500 errors
Fixed risk direction and stop-loss validation
Fixed HTF alignment scoring against actual trade direction
Added Bearer security scheme and user-scoped journal/analytics/signal history
Restricted CORS to an explicit allowlist
Added API regression tests and backend CI
Upgraded targetSdk/compileSdk to 35, AGP 8.7.3 and Gradle wrapper 8.9
Fixed Android notification permission lint error
Fixed overlay index rebasing after chart candle trimming
Scaled chart from visible candles instead of hidden historical range
Limited and de-overlapped killzones, liquidity labels, structure labels and zones
Disabled session overlays on 4h and 1d charts
Added Yahoo Finance fallback for Forex, gold and indices
Added TwelveData 429 circuit breaker and stale-cache fallback
Mapped 1d to TwelveData 1day and normalized every supported timeframe
Stopped raw provider URLs and API keys from reaching API/UI errors
Built HTF candles locally to reduce provider requests
Cancelled stale Android chart requests on symbol/timeframe changes
Added LTR symbol/timeframe selectors with auto-scroll
Validated 10 symbols x 7 timeframes (70/70 provider and SMC matrix pass)
Maximum two recent London/New York killzones
Maximum one bullish and one bearish Order Block on main chart
Only four recent BOS/CHoCH events and three IDM markers
Only Entry, Safe SL and TP1 trade-plan lines
FVG, Breaker and Fibonacci overlays hidden from main chart but retained in detail data
Cleaner chart legend and increased chart height
Important OB and FVG boxes extend until first price revisit
Maximum one bullish and one bearish OB
Maximum one bullish and one bearish FVG/iFVG
Single important breaker box with faint fill and dashed border
Latest BSL and SSL liquidity lines
IDM dots retained without chart clutter
Zone end_idx added and rebased safely
Bottom navigation reduced to Dashboard, Setups, Risk, Broker and Profile
Chart and Signals remain available from Dashboard and setup details
New cached scanner across 10 symbols and 7 timeframes
Confirmed, forming and invalidated setup sections
Setup filters by symbol and timeframe
Setup cards with grade, probability, confluence, RR, entry, safe SL and TP1
Tap setup to open its live symbol/timeframe chart
Eight core SMC/ICT setup classifiers exposed without synthetic signals
GET retry with exponential backoff for Render cold starts
Longer network timeouts for setup matrix scan
In-memory cache for charts, setups and public signals
Friendly network errors without host/IP details
Local Demo uses public SMC analysis instead of protected signal endpoints
Local Demo no longer shows 401 for signal history
Expired server tokens trigger automatic logout
Dashboard public data no longer depends on authenticated trade stats
Demo-safe Journal, Analytics and Backtest states
Stable committed debug signing key for future in-place APK updates
GitHub Actions upgraded to current Node 24 releases
LTR scrollable chart legend with safe padding
Compact Bull OB/Bear OB zone labels
Chart scroll resets on symbol/timeframe change
Spatial collision filtering for BOS/CHoCH labels
Spatial collision filtering for IDM labels
Pure ChartRenderPolicy with Android unit tests
Data Quality Engine with integrity, gaps, duplicates, outliers and volume coverage
Market Regime classifier: trending, balanced, volatile, compressed and choppy
Strict Decision Engine with 12 hard gates
No-Trade default and direction-specific LONG/SHORT labels
Uncalibrated probability explicitly labeled as model estimate
Strict Omega downgrades legacy signals and removes plans when gates fail
Grounded AI evidence, risks and what-would-confirm fields
Setup scanner confirmed count now uses strict gates
OKX perpetual swap real trades, depth, open interest and funding
Aggressive buy/sell delta and real CVD curve
Depth imbalance, spread bps and wall strength
Large trade imbalance, absorption, climax and divergence
Orderflow alignment, spread and depth-conflict gates
Forex OHLCV/tick-volume proxy explicitly labeled non-real
Android REAL OF/PROXY OF, depth, spread, OI and funding chips
FORMING, ARMED, CONFIRMED, TRIGGERED, INVALIDATED and EXPIRED states
Lifecycle timestamps, transition reasons and scan counts
Portfolio heat and open-risk budget hard gates
Drawdown-based deterministic risk reduction and maximum drawdown block
Explicit or transparently labelled structural correlation proxy
Spread, slippage and volatility-aware position sizing
Entry activation required before a backtest trade exists
Conservative same-bar stop-first and adverse gap execution
Fees, spread, slippage and funding deducted from net R results
Unclosed trades marked to market by default
Strictly increasing timestamps and closed-candle anti-look-ahead contract
Android portfolio risk and conservative backtest diagnostics
Immutable deterministic decision core; AI cannot authorize or override execution
Provider-agnostic adapters for OpenAI-compatible and Gemini APIs
Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint support through environment configuration
Evidence Packet contract with unique evidence IDs and source labels
Mandatory positive evidence, negative evidence and invalidation
Critic/verifier rejects unsupported citations, numbers, probabilities and invalidations
Refusal when critical evidence is missing
External AI opt-in with timeout, cache and circuit breaker
Provider errors sanitized without keys, URLs or raw exceptions
Authenticated explanation endpoint and secret-safe provider status endpoint
Android evidence, negative evidence, verifier and calibration panel
PostgreSQL 16 production backend with psycopg connection pool
SQLite local/test fallback and legacy schema upgrade
Real PostgreSQL GitHub Actions integration gate
Hashed session tokens and upgraded PBKDF2 password hashes
Request ID, structured JSON HTTP logs and secret-safe errors
Auth, AI, heavy and default sliding-window rate limits
Request body size enforcement and production security headers
Liveness, readiness, authenticated deep health and metrics
SQLite/PostgreSQL backup and verified restore tooling
Render Blueprint PostgreSQL binding through fromDatabase
APK release provenance manifest with Git SHA and SHA-256
RC production runbook and rollback policy
38 local tests plus PostgreSQL CI integration test

iterations.version: v3.1 Quant Alpha 1 - Evidence & Calibration Lab
features: Versioned point-in-time dataset manifest with SHA-256
Strict OHLCV CSV validation and duplicate timestamp rejection
Sign-flip null test with Bonferroni multiple-testing control
Purged walk-forward and embargo evidence contract
Monte Carlo drawdown percentiles and simulated risk-of-ruin
Brier score, Brier skill, ECE, MCE, log loss and reliability bins
Calibration ID only for independent holdout evidence
Deterministic analysis fingerprint and random seed

iterations.version: v3.1 Data Alpha 1 - Historical Data Pipeline
features: UTC canonicalization, dedup and gap diagnostics
PostgreSQL schema v2 quant dataset registry

iterations.version: v3.1 Research Alpha 1 - Stored Backtest & Purged Walk-forward
features: Quant validation on activated OOS trades only

iterations.version: v3.1 Robustness Alpha 1 - Market Baseline & CSCV/PBO
v3.2 Validation Alpha 1 - Automated Panel & Final Holdout
features: Immutable PostgreSQL experiment lock schema v3
Holdout preserved when panel robustness fails

iterations.version: v3.3 BYOK Alpha 1 - Encrypted User Provider Vault
features: PostgreSQL schema v4 user secret vault
Groq and OpenAI user-scoped explanation routing

iterations.version: v3.4 Paper Alpha 1 - Paper OMS & Execution Safety
features: Default-disabled paper execution and engaged kill switch
User-scoped order, fill and append-only event ledger
Idempotency key and canonical request hash
Partial fills and weighted average price

iterations.version: v3.4 Paper Alpha 2 - Portfolio Equity Ledger
features: Signed positions and weighted average entry

login_credentials.production: Shared demo account disabled by default

features: Signal filtering by grade (A+ to F)
Action labels (STRONG_BUY, BUY, CONSIDER, WAIT, AVOID)
Drawdown risk multiplier and maximum drawdown block
Measured spread requirement and slippage policy
Historical testing using closed candles only
Fees, spread, slippage and funding costs
Gross/cost/net R, drawdown and no-entry reporting
Parameter sweep with minimum activated-trade gate

production_rc.database: PostgreSQL 16 via DATABASE_URL; SQLite only for local/test

smc_ict_engine.name: Smart Money Concept / ICT Analysis Engine

A_plus.label: A+
A_plus.criteria: Perfect confluence, strong structure, optimal RR

omega_100_rule.name: Omega-100 Compliance System
action_labels: AVOID - F-grade or critically low scores

components.name: Break of Structure (BOS)
components.description: Price breaks previous swing high/low with close confirmation

components.name: Change of Character (CHoCH)
components.description: Shift from lower lows to higher lows (or vice versa)

liquidity_analysis.inner_day_moves: IDM labels on chart for swing points
liquidity_analysis.visible_range_scaling: Adapt detection to chart zoom level

components.name: Invalidation Level
components.description: Point where setup thesis is broken

recent_commits.message: Restore AiSignalBoard composable used by SignalsScreen (was accidentally removed in rewrite)
Fix SmcScanResponse.signals field access for chart live signals
TradingView-style chart redesign: TV colors, axis right panel, OB labels inside zones, BOS/CHoCH arrows, IDM dots, colored price-tag on axis, live signals scanner at bottom
Increase HTTP timeouts, add UA + Connection header, retry enabled
Fix critical bug: watching-loop overwrote 'direction' variable causing F-grade signals to show short/long instead of neutral
v8.1 Fixes: Backend plan_lines fix + TradingView-style chart complete redesign
Omega-100 Rule: enforce RR>=2, conf>=40, prob>=60 for actionable signals
Phase C v8 Ultra: pro indicator suite (RSI/MACD/Stoch/BB/ADX/CCI/Williams/MFI/CMF/PSAR/Ichimoku/EMA/Pats/Div)
Phase C v7: fix Fib OTE legs, OB mitigation tolerance, deep retracement entries
Phase C v6 Ultra SMC: ICT-grade engine with 20-factor confluence and A+ to F grading

steps: Configure .env file with API keys and database
Open project/android folder in Android Studio
Build debug APK or run on emulator

deployment.database: PostgreSQL 16 for production through Render Blueprint; SQLite fallback restricted to local/test

safety_notices.legal: No guarantee of profit or signal accuracy
safety_notices.risk_management: Always use testnet/demo before live trading
safety_notices.backtest_caveat: Backtest results alone insufficient for live decisions
safety_notices.user_responsibility: User fully responsible for trading decisions
safety_notices.market_disclaimer: This is analysis support software, not trading advice

future_roadmap.description: Complete Firebase integration for push notifications
Full API integration for MetaTrader 5 execution

paper_alpha3.scope: Opt-in automated real public crypto quote feed for Paper OMS
limitations: No funding, margin, or liquidation simulation

paper_alpha4.scope: Conservative paper margin, funding and liquidation simulation

paper_alpha5.scope: Public testnet connectivity, recovery checkpoints, shadow reconciliation, ledger audit and structural concentration controls

paper_alpha6.scope: Immutable stored-dataset statistical correlation snapshots and encrypted private Testnet read-only probes

paper_alpha7.scope: Authenticated private Testnet read-only order/fill reconciliation and deterministic recovery drills
limitations: External client ID must match Paper order ID
